title: Beyond the Veil
description: A dimensional breach has opened near Crossroads, and entities from another plane are seeping through. The barrier between worlds is weakening. You must close the breach before otherworldly horrors flood into our realm. This will require channeling immense magical power and facing extraplanar threats unlike anything you've encountered.

objectives.description: Assess the dimensional breach near Crossroads
Gather components for the sealing ritual
objectives.notes: Dropped by planar entities emerging from the breach
Otherworldly creatures immune to normal damage

objectives.description: Empower the four ley line anchors around the breach
objectives.notes: Channel magic into each anchor stone

objectives.description: Perform the sealing ritual to close the breach
objectives.notes: Long channeling ritual, must survive waves of enemies

objectives.description: Report the breach closure to Archmage Elara

notes: Second Adept quest. Major combat encounter with unique enemies. Defense/survival mechanics. Rewards legendary staff.
